title: Why Is Constellation Brands (STZ) Stock Down Today?
text: Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ ) stock is falling on Friday after the beverage company revealed details of a debt offering. That debt offering has the company selling $750 million worth of 4.9% Senior Notes due 2033.

title: Constellation Brands Prices Offering of Senior Notes
text: VICTOR, N.Y., April 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today that it priced the public offering of $750.0 million aggregate principal amount of 4.900% Senior Notes due 2033 (the “notes”) for a public offering price of 99.306% of the principal amount of the notes. The notes will be senior obligations that rank equally with all of Constellation's other senior unsecured indebtedness.

title: Constellation Brands Further Strengthens ESG Commitment with New Waste Reduction and Circular Packaging Targets

title: Constellation Brands: Beer Business Remains Key Driver
text: Mexican beer portfolio of Constellation Brands continues to drive growth and will likely show sustained demand despite macroeconomic tightening. The company's Wine & Spirits business continues to underperform despite brand divestitures and suffers from higher operating inefficiencies compared to the beer business.

title: 5 Stocks Poised to Benefit From Favorable Alcohol Industry Trends
text: The Beverages - Alcohol industry looks poised for growth on favorable demand trends, innovation, diversification, premiumization and digital growth amid elevated input and packaging costs. Players like BUD, STZ, BF.B, TAP and NAPA will likely capitalize.

title: Is Constellation Brands Stock a Buy?
text: Constellation Brands' beer business is growing but is pressured by rising costs. Look for improving margins this year as the wine and spirits segment rebounds.

title: Is Constellation Brands Star About To Rise?
text: Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ) shares have been under pressure all year, but that may be changing. The Q4 results were better than expected and point to continued consolidation of the company's leadership position.

title: Constellation Brands (STZ) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Constellation Brands (STZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.45% and 1.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 2 Stocks Rising on Strong Business Performance
text: Markets were likely to ease lower to start the Thursday trading session. Lamb Weston got a big boost in revenue thanks to smart sales efforts.

title: Constellation Brands ups dividend after fiscal 4Q earnings beat
text: Beverage company Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) reported its fiscal fourth quarter 2023 earnings on Thursday that showed better-than-expected profit but weaker revenue. For the three-month period to end February 22, 2023, Constellation posted comparable earnings per share (EPS) of $1.98, topping analyst estimates of $1.84.

title: Constellation Brands Stock Rises on Earnings Beat and Dividend Boost
text: Adjusted fiscal fourth-quarter earnings of $1.98 a share at the beer and spirits maker top analysts' estimates.

title: Constellation Brands stock falls after revenue falls short of estimates
text: Constellation Brands Inc.'s stock STZ, +1.47% slid 0.8% in premarket trade Thursday, after the drinks company's fourth0-quarter revenue fell short of estimates. The company posted net income of $223 million, or $1.21 a share, for the quarter, down from $395.4 million, or $2.07 a share, in the year-earlier period.
